NVDA.title: Integrity Wealth Partners LLC Makes New Investment in Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. $AMD
NVDA.summary: Integrity Wealth Partners LLC has made a new investment in Advanced Micro Devices (AMD), purchasing 1,978 shares valued at approximately $402,000 during the first quarter. AMD continues to receive a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with several firms raising price targets due to strong quarterly results, robust data center momentum, and demand for AI infrastructure. However, concerns about AMD's valuation, competition, and recent semiconductor-sector volatility persist.

NVDA.title: Cambient Family Office LLC Has $48.33 Million Position in NVIDIA Corporation $NVDA
NVDA.summary: Cambient Family Office LLC increased its stake in NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) by 6.3% in the first quarter, now holding 277,107 shares valued at $48.33 million, making it their largest position. The article notes that Wall Street analysts are largely bullish on NVIDIA, with a consensus "Buy" rating and an average price target of $303.84, following strong Q1 earnings and a dividend increase. Despite positive sentiment around AI demand and partnerships, recent insider selling and concerns about competition and valuation reflect mixed near-term views on the stock.

NVDA.title: Beaumont Asset Management L.L.C. Takes Position in NVIDIA Corporation $NVDA
NVDA.summary: Beaumont Asset Management L.L.C. initiated a new position in NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) during the first quarter, acquiring 2,662 shares valued at approximately $464,000. Other major institutional investors have also recently increased their stakes in NVIDIA. The company reported strong financial results, including $1.87 EPS and $81.61 billion in quarterly revenue, and announced an increased dividend of $0.25 per share along with an $80 billion share buyback authorization.

NVDA.title: Synaptics (NASDAQ:SYNA) Upgraded by Wall Street Zen to Buy Rating
NVDA.summary: Wall Street Zen has upgraded Synaptics (NASDAQ:SYNA) from a "hold" to a "buy" rating, despite the stock maintaining a consensus "hold" rating and a target price of $134.82 among analysts. The upgrade follows Synaptics' stronger-than-expected quarterly results, with EPS of $1.09 and revenue of $294.2 million, a 10.4% year-over-year increase. Insider selling by executives continues, while institutional investors hold a significant 99.43% stake in the company.

NVDA.title: Apple Is About 4% Away From Overtaking Nvidia as the World's Most Valuable Company. Could It Happen This Month?
NVDA.summary: Apple is currently about 4% behind Nvidia in market capitalization, with Nvidia at $4.7 trillion and Apple at $4.5 trillion. Apple recently gained ground due to reports of an expanded iPhone lineup, while Nvidia saw a broader chip stock sell-off. Apple has a potential catalyst with its upcoming fiscal third-quarter earnings report on July 30 and rumors of new iPhones, whereas Nvidia, despite faster growth and a cheaper stock, does not report again until late August, leaving its shares exposed to AI sentiment shifts.

NVDA.title: Amdocs (NASDAQ: DOX), 1Finity, And Supermicro (NASDAQ: SMCI) Validate AI-RAN Blueprint Built On NVIDIA (NASDAQ: NVDA) Infrastructure
NVDA.summary: Amdocs, 1Finity, and Supermicro have validated an AI-RAN blueprint leveraging NVIDIA-accelerated infrastructure to create a unified, multivendor foundation for autonomous network operations. This initiative aims to establish a cloud-native platform for future edge AI services in telecommunications, enhancing network performance and enabling outcome-driven management. The collaboration signifies a move towards resilient and autonomous network infrastructure, integrating AI at the network layer to reduce operational complexity and improve next-generation service delivery.

NVDA.title: 3 Reasons to Avoid TFSL and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
NVDA.summary: This article explains three reasons why investors should avoid TFS Financial (TFSL), despite its recent stock performance. The author highlights the company's weak net interest income, low net interest margin, and slow EPS growth as key concerns. Instead of TFSL, the article suggests focusing on high-quality growth stocks with strong revenue growth.

NVDA.title: 3 Reasons to Avoid TFSL and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
NVDA.summary: The article advises investors to avoid TFS Financial (TFSL) despite its recent stock price increase, citing three main reasons for potential underperformance: weak net interest income growth, a low net interest margin indicating poor loan book profitability, and barely growing earnings per share. Instead, it suggests investing in a different all-weather company, specifically mentioning the owner of Taco Bell, and also promotes an AI-driven list of top growth stocks.

MSFT.title: Boston Trust Walden Corp Sells 10,630 Shares of Chevron Corporation $CVX
MSFT.summary: Boston Trust Walden Corp reduced its stake in Chevron Corporation by 9.1% during the first quarter, selling 10,630 shares and retaining 106,428 shares valued at $22.0 million. Chevron reported strong Q1 earnings per share of $1.41, exceeding analyst estimates, although revenue fell below expectations. Analyst sentiment remains largely positive, with several firms reiterating "Buy" or "Outperform" ratings, and the stock carries a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average price target of $205.71.

MSFT.title: EPAM Systems explores digital engineering growth opportunities
MSFT.summary: EPAM Systems continues to expand its role in digital platform engineering and consulting, attracting investors interested in scalable software services and cloud-native architectures. The company specializes in designing and building complex software solutions for enterprises transitioning to cloud-native architectures and microservices, offering services from custom application development to strategic consulting. EPAM's business model focuses on long-term client relationships and high-value engineering, balancing cost efficiency with specialized skills through distributed delivery centers.

MSFT.title: RAAX Stock Price | VanEck Real Assets ETF
MSFT.summary: This article provides detailed financial information for the VanEck Real Assets ETF (RAAX), including its current stock price, trading exchange (NYSE), and key statistics like dividend yield (2.0766%), expense ratio (0.69%), and total assets ($969.68M). It also includes recent news, technical analysis signals (Strong Sell), and a list of its top holdings. The fund, launched on April 9, 2018, invests in public equity, fixed income, and commodity markets, benchmarking against the Bloomberg Commodity Index and S&P 500.

MSFT.title: Synaptics (NASDAQ:SYNA) Upgraded by Wall Street Zen to Buy Rating
MSFT.summary: Wall Street Zen has upgraded Synaptics (NASDAQ:SYNA) from a "hold" to a "buy" rating, despite the stock maintaining a consensus "hold" rating and a target price of $134.82 among analysts. The upgrade follows Synaptics' stronger-than-expected quarterly results, with EPS of $1.09 and revenue of $294.2 million, a 10.4% year-over-year increase. Insider selling by executives continues, while institutional investors hold a significant 99.43% stake in the company.

MSFT.title: MSFX - T-Rex 2X Long Microsoft Daily Target ETF Short Interest
MSFT.summary: This article provides detailed financial data for the MSFX - T-Rex 2X Long Microsoft Daily Target ETF. It covers key metrics such as its last closing price, percentage change, expense ratio, IPO date, asset type, and various performance indicators. The ETF has an AUM of $31.08M and shows significant year-to-date flows.

MSFT.title: If You Invested $1,000 in FTAI Aviation Ltd (FTAI)
MSFT.summary: This article examines the historical performance of FTAI Aviation Ltd (FTAI) by calculating the returns of a hypothetical $1,000 investment over various periods, comparing it to the S&P 500, and providing annual return data. It also offers a detailed overview of FTAI Aviation Ltd's business, including its focus on commercial jet engines, MRE offerings, aviation leasing, and new initiatives like FTAI Power, along with its corporate structure and financial reporting.

MSFT.title: VT vs. SCHF: Which International ETF Is the Better Buy for Investors?
MSFT.summary: This article compares two international ETFs, Vanguard Total World Stock ETF (VT) and Schwab International Equity ETF (SCHF), for investors looking to diversify beyond U.S. borders. VT offers broader diversification with over 10,000 holdings including U.S. and emerging markets, while SCHF focuses on developed international markets, excluding the U.S., and provides a higher dividend yield. The choice depends on an investor's strategy for international exposure, whether it's a complete global solution or a targeted international complement to existing U.S. holdings.

MSFT.title: Tesla Joins Uber in Capping Employee AI Spending - Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA), Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER), Ac
MSFT.summary: Tesla has implemented a new policy to cap employee AI spending at $200 per week, following a similar move by Uber, which set a $1,500 monthly limit after its annual AI budget was exhausted quickly. This trend highlights a shift in enterprise AI adoption where companies are now focused on managing the escalating costs associated with advanced AI model usage. The challenge for companies is no longer encouraging AI adoption but managing the financial implications, potentially benefiting software providers that optimize AI usage.

GOOGL.title: ETFs Investing in Standard Lithium Ltd. Stocks
GOOGL.summary: This article lists several ETFs that invest in Standard Lithium Ltd. stocks, providing details such as market value, weight, issuer, management style, expense ratio, AUM, and performance metrics like price change and NAV total return. The ETFs highlighted include those focused on clean energy, lithium and battery technology, rare earth and strategic metals, and climate solutions.

GOOGL.title: FTI Consulting News Bytes – 3 July 2026
GOOGL.summary: This FTI Consulting News Bytes report for July 3, 2026, highlights major developments in the Telecom, Media & Technology sector, focusing on intense AI competition, regulatory concerns, corporate transformations, and consumer technology advancements. Key stories include Google restricting Meta's access to Gemini AI, the Bank of England's call for new regulations for "agentic AI," BT and Verizon combining international operations, Comcast spinning off NBCUniversal and Sky, and WhatsApp introducing usernames for enhanced privacy.

GOOGL.title: MSCI’s Approach to SpaceX Discredits the ESG Cartel
GOOGL.summary: The article criticizes MSCI's ESG rating for SpaceX, arguing that it's absurd to rank the innovative American company on par with hostile foreign adversaries like Russia. The author contends that ESG ratings often prioritize ideological agendas over financial returns and American interests, undermining free enterprise. MSCI's rating of SpaceX is presented as evidence that ESG acts as a mechanism for ideological ends rather than genuine "socially conscious investing."

GOOGL.title: Avast Premium Security from Gen Digital - cross?platform protection for US households
GOOGL.summary: Avast Premium Security, a product of Gen Digital, offers multi-platform protection for up to 10 devices, combining antivirus, ransomware shields, and Wi-Fi protection in a single subscription for US households. The service emphasizes ease of use with features like Smart Scan and Ransomware Shield, aiming to simplify digital security for everyday users. While competitive in the security market and praised for its detection rates, the article notes past privacy concerns related to data collection, which Avast claims to have addressed.

GOOGL.title: Alphabet C explores new growth avenues as investors weigh long-term potential
GOOGL.summary: Alphabet C (GOOG) is gaining investor attention due to its diversified digital businesses, strong cash generation, and exposure to global online search, advertising, and cloud services. The company's multi-class share structure, core businesses including Google Search, YouTube, and Google Cloud, along with its "Other Bets," position it for long-term growth. Despite competitive and regulatory challenges, Alphabet's scale and innovation in AI-driven applications, cloud adoption, and connected devices are key to its sustained success.

GOOGL.title: Verizon Communications Inc. $VZ Stake Lowered by Leonteq Securities AG
GOOGL.summary: Leonteq Securities AG decreased its stake in Verizon Communications Inc. by 53.4% in the first quarter, now holding 57,333 shares valued at $2.88 million. Despite this, Verizon reported strong Q1 earnings, beating estimates with $1.28 per share, and reaffirmed its FY2026 EPS guidance. The company remains an attractive investment due to its 6.6% dividend yield and a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from Wall Street analysts.

GOOGL.title: Alphabet president John Kent Walker sells $3.14m in Class C stock
GOOGL.summary: John Kent Walker, President, Global Affairs, and Chief Legal Officer of Alphabet Inc., sold approximately $3.14 million in Class C Capital Stock on June 29, 2026, through a pre-arranged trading plan. This sale involved 9,998 shares, with Alphabet shares having surged over 106% in the past year, although InvestingPro analysis indicates the stock is currently trading above its Fair Value. The article also mentions recent news regarding Alphabet, including regulatory scrutiny in South Korea, expansion of its Gemini AI product line, and the termination of a robotaxi partnership with Uber.

GOOGL.title: Is TeraWulf (WULF) A Bargain As It Builds A Nuclear Powered AI Platform?
GOOGL.summary: TeraWulf (WULF) is transitioning from Bitcoin mining to a nuclear-powered AI and high-performance computing platform, highlighted by its Lake Mariner campus. Despite recent short-term share price drops, the stock shows strong year-to-date and one-year returns, and analysts still see it as undervalued. The pivot includes multi-billion-dollar hyperscale hosting agreements, promising diversified revenue streams, though execution and financing risks exist.
